intentSynonyms: look up an artist in spotify
fetch a single artist in spotify
view one specific artist in spotify
get artist details and top tracks in spotify
description: Get detailed information about a Spotify artist including name, biography, followers, monthly listeners, and top tracks. Provide the artist's Spotify URI (e.g., spotify:artist:0OdUWJ0sBjDrqHygGUXeCF).
